title: Alarm Ref Discovery
description: Object representation for for a single alarm reference discovery

name.description: Friendly name for the reference, if known

category.description: Category that this alarm is classified as

requires_ack.description: Indicates whether or not alarm activation requries acknowledgement.

return_to_normal_event.description: Indicates whether or not the alarm sends return-to-normal events.

return_requires_ack.description: Indicates whether or not returning to normal requries acknowledgement.
